rulings.Case Title: TATIANA KOGAN VS. NOEL YESCAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Plaintiff To Compel Defendant To Respond To Written Discovery And Produce Documents; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for March 2, 2018 Line 6 . PLAINTIFF TATIANA KOGAN Notice Of Motion And Motion By Plaintiff To Compel Defendant To Respond To Written Discovery And Produce Documents; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Counsel GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to Set One of discovery. No Separate Statement could be located in Plaintiff's filing. The Court received 1-inch thick stack of unbound loose paper. Motion is GRANTED, subject to opposition as to Set Three of discovery. Complete verified responses without objections to Set Three of Discovery to be served within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Request for Sanctions is DENIED. =(501/REQ)
